title: ThreadStatic should be avoided on non-static fields
description: "ThreadStatic" should not be used on non-static fieldsAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearreliabilityBugQuick FixIDE quick fixes available with SonarQube for IDEunusedWhy is this an issue?How can I fix it?More InfoWhen you annotate a field with theThreadStaticattribute, it is an indication that the value of this field is unique for each thread. But if you don’t mark the field asstatic, then theThreadStaticattribute is ignored.TheThreadStaticattribute should either be removed or replaced with the use ofThreadLocal<T>class, which gives a similar behavior for non-static fields.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CI©2025SonarSource Sàrl. All rights reserved.Priva
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

checks.message: ThreadStatic attribute is ignored on non-static fields. Either make the field static or use ThreadLocal<T> instead.

logic.triggering_conditions: source contains [ThreadStatic] attribute followed by field declaration without 'static' keyword
logic.reasoning: The [ThreadStatic] attribute only works on static fields. When applied to non-static (instance) fields, the attribute is silently ignored by the runtime, which leads to bugs. Use ThreadLocal<T> for thread-local storage on instance fields.
